documentation.readme: Features • Installation • Usage • Running naabu • Config • NMAP integration • CDN/WAF Exclusion • Discord
usage_sections: Features: - Fast And Simple SYN/CONNECT/UDP probe based scanning - Optimized for ease of use and lightweight on resources - DNS Port scan - Automatic IP Deduplication for DNS port scan - IPv4/IPv6 Port scan (experimental) - Passive Port enumeration using Shodan Internetdb - Host Discovery

arguments.name: -arp
arguments.description: ARP ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)

arguments.name: -arp-ping
arguments.description: ARP ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)

arguments.name: -auth
arguments.description: configure projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) api key (default true)

arguments.name: -cdn
arguments.description: display cdn in use

arguments.name: -csv
arguments.description: write output in csv format

arguments.name: -dashboard
arguments.description: upload / view output in projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) UI dashboard

arguments.name: -debug
arguments.description: display debugging information

arguments.name: -disable-update-check
arguments.description: disable automatic naabu update check

arguments.name: -DISCOVERY
arguments.description: -sD, -service-discovery identify services by port number

arguments.name: -display-cdn
arguments.description: display cdn in use

arguments.name: -duc
arguments.description: disable automatic naabu update check

arguments.name: -ec
arguments.description: skip full port scans for CDN/WAF (only scan for port 80,443)

arguments.name: -exclude-cdn
arguments.description: skip full port scans for CDN/WAF (only scan for port 80,443)

arguments.name: -hc
arguments.description: run diagnostic check up

arguments.name: -health-check
arguments.description: run diagnostic check up

arguments.name: -host-discovery
arguments.description: Perform Only Host Discovery

arguments.name: -il
arguments.description: list available interfaces and public ip

arguments.name: -interface-list
arguments.description: list available interfaces and public ip

arguments.name: -json
arguments.description: write output in JSON lines format

arguments.name: -LIMIT
arguments.description: -c int general internal worker threads (default 25)

arguments.name: -nc
arguments.description: disable colors in CLI output

arguments.name: -nd
arguments.description: IPv6 Neighbor Discovery (host discovery needs to be enabled)

arguments.name: -nd-ping
arguments.description: IPv6 Neighbor Discovery (host discovery needs to be enabled)

arguments.name: -nmap
arguments.description: invoke nmap scan on targets (nmap must be installed) - Deprecated

arguments.name: -no-color
arguments.description: disable colors in CLI output

arguments.name: -no-stdin
arguments.description: Disable Stdin processing

arguments.name: -passive
arguments.description: display passive open ports using shodan internetdb api (automatically enables stream mode)

arguments.name: -pd
arguments.description: upload / view output in projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) UI dashboard

arguments.name: -pe
arguments.description: ICMP echo request Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)

arguments.name: -ping
arguments.description: ping probes for verification of host

arguments.name: -pm
arguments.description: ICMP address mask request Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)

arguments.name: -Pn
arguments.description: Skip Host discovery (Deprecated: use -wn/-with-host-discovery instead)

arguments.name: -pp
arguments.description: ICMP timestamp request Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)

arguments.name: -probe-icmp-address-mask
arguments.description: ICMP address mask request Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)

arguments.name: -probe-icmp-echo
arguments.description: ICMP echo request Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)

arguments.name: -probe-icmp-timestamp
arguments.description: ICMP timestamp request Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)

arguments.name: -resume
arguments.description: resume scan using resume.cfg

arguments.name: -rev-ptr
arguments.description: Reverse PTR lookup for input ips

arguments.name: -sa
arguments.description: scan all the IP's associated with DNS record

arguments.name: -scan-all-ips
arguments.description: scan all the IP's associated with DNS record

arguments.name: -sD
arguments.description: identify services by port number

arguments.name: -service-discovery
arguments.description: identify services by port number

arguments.name: -service-probes
arguments.description: Multiple input support - **STDIN/HOST/IP/CIDR/ASN**

arguments.name: -service-version
arguments.description: detect service versions using nmap-service-probes

arguments.name: -show-dead
arguments.description: show hosts that did not respond to host discovery (requires host discovery)

arguments.name: -silent
arguments.description: display only results in output

arguments.name: -skip-host-discovery
arguments.description: Skip Host discovery (Deprecated: use -wn/-with-host-discovery instead)

arguments.name: -smart-scan
arguments.description: predictive port scanning using port correlation model (not compatible with stream mode)

arguments.name: -sn
arguments.description: Perform Only Host Discovery

arguments.name: -sr
arguments.description: use system DNS as fallback resolver

arguments.name: -ss
arguments.description: predictive port scanning using port correlation model (not compatible with stream mode)

arguments.name: -stats
arguments.description: display stats of the running scan (deprecated)

arguments.name: -stream
arguments.description: stream mode (disables resume, nmap, verify, retries, shuffling, etc)

arguments.name: -sV
arguments.description: detect service versions using nmap-service-probes

arguments.name: -sV-fast
arguments.description: only probe port-hinted services (faster, skips fallback)

arguments.name: -system-resolver
arguments.description: use system DNS as fallback resolver

arguments.name: -udp-probes
arguments.description: send protocol-specific payloads on UDP scans using nmap-service-probes

arguments.name: -uP
arguments.description: send protocol-specific payloads on UDP scans using nmap-service-probes

arguments.name: -up
arguments.description: update naabu to latest version

arguments.name: -update
arguments.description: update naabu to latest version

arguments.name: --target
arguments.description: Target host, IP, MAC, or URL the tool operates on.

chain_examples.note: Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with projectdiscovery/uncover (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with projectdiscovery/tlsx (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with projectdiscovery/subfinder (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Phase 3: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 4: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 5: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the recon category. Fits when the engagement needs: Features • Installation • Usage • Running naabu • Config • NMAP integration • CDN/WAF Exclusion • Discord.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: Features • Installation • Usage • Running naabu • Config • NMAP integration • CDN/WAF Exclusion • Discord.
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: go install -v github.com/projectdiscovery/naabu/v2/cmd/naabu@latest. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `naabu -h`. Further invocations from upstream: `Download the ready to run [binary]($KFIOSA_TARGET_URL / [docker]($KFIOSA_TARGET_URL or install with GO`; `naabu -host hackerone.com`. Features • Installation • Usage • Running naabu • Config • NMAP integration • CDN/WAF Exclusion • Discord.
